name: Shell Metacharacters
description: File contains shell metacharacters like < > | & ; ` $

name: Multiple Null Bytes
description: File contains 5 or more consecutive null bytes

name: Unicode RTL Override
description: File contains RTL override character which can hide real file extension

name: Long Base64 Strings
description: File contains suspiciously long Base64-encoded strings

name: SQL/Script Injection Keywords
description: Possible SQL or script injection keywords found

name: Hex or Unicode Escapes
description: Hex or Unicode escape sequences found

name: Command Execution Keywords
description: Contains suspicious commands like wget, bash, powershell etc.

name: Unicode Control Characters
description: File contains invisible or control characters

name: Fake File Extensions
description: File name contains multiple extensions (e.g. .jpg.exe)

name: Suspicious Combining Unicode
description: Excessive use of combining characters (Zalgo text)

name: NOP Sled
description: Classic NOP sled pattern in shellcode

name: PE Header
description: Windows executable signature (MZ header) found in text file

name: PDF Encryption
description: Encrypted stream in PDF detected

name: Long XML Tags
description: Extremely long XML tag may indicate exploit attempt

name: Broken JSON
description: Extremely large JSON block (DoS risk)

name: Zero Width Space
description: Invisible Unicode whitespace characters used for evasion

name: Cyrillic Homoglyphs
description: Cyrillic homoglyphs (used for phishing or evasion)

name: PowerShell Payload
description: Obfuscated PowerShell command detected

name: Command Injection Characters
description: Command injection characters in input

name: Multiple File Extensions
description: Multiple file extensions found (e.g. .docx.exe)

name: Obfuscated JavaScript
description: Obfuscated script execution pattern

name: Unusual High ASCII
description: Long block of non-ASCII text (binary or encoded data)
